provenance: t1_f1_classification.json records classified PRE_EXISTING_UNCOMMITTED_WIP (uncommitted ca07/conmon test-feature pairs, T10 curation lane); the other 5 UNRESOLVED records were reclassified PRE_EXISTING_COMMITTED and fixed in the burn-down (burndown_record.json)

expected_skips.limitation: runs launched with -q --tb=no do not list skip identities; skip verification is count-based for run 2. The clean-candidate qualification run MUST add -rs so skip identities are verifiable by ID.

source_state_binding.note: expected failures are bound to these exact WIP file bytes at expectation-pin time; if the files change (parallel remediation), the expectation is STALE and must be re-pinned, not force-matched

canonical_pointer.rule: post-run pointer hash must equal this AND content must contain no pytest- reference - proves no test-to-live-state leakage during the run
